steps.title: Identify the appositive structure
steps.content: Two artist names immediately follow the noun artists to specify which particular artists we mean. This is an appositive phrase positioning.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
Appositives that specify which noun we're talking about (not adding extra information) require no commas.

Choice C follows this rule exactly—no punctuation between artists and the names.

Choices A and D add unnecessary commas; choice B uses an incorrect colon and retains an extra comma.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
